title: excoecaria biglandulosa var. pavoniana
intro: Excoecaria biglandulosa var. pavoniana is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the 'Pavoniana Touchwood.' It is also known as 'Pavoniana poison tree' due to its toxic properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Excoecaria biglandulosa var. pavoniana include extracts and infusions used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
